steps.title: Identify the time marker
steps.content: The phrase “wouldn't come until decades later” signals a jump forward in time from 1929 to a much later discovery. This time reference is the decisive clue.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: ”Eventually” matches the “decades later” reference, indicating the later discovery. The other three options misframe the passage by suggesting reformulation, exemplification, or backward movement in time. That matches choice C — C is correct.
